publishedAbstract: - The pods in the `amq-broker` project remain in a pending status.- It is not possible to find the driver name `openshift-storage.rbd.csi.ceph.com` in the project where `amq-broker` service is configured. ~~~ MountVolume.MountDevice failed for volume "PVC_NAME": kubernetes.io/csi: attacher.MountDevice failed to create newCsiDriverClient: driver name openshift-storage.rbd.csi.ceph.com not found in the list of registered CSI drivers. ~~~
publishedTitle: AMQ Broker cannot find the driver "openshift-storage.rbd.csi.ceph.com" in the list of registered CSI drivers.
